use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HORMONE RECEPTOR POSITIVE ADVANCED BREAST CANCER IN POSTMENOPAUSAL WOMEN

indications.text:
Monotherapy
Fulvestrant Injection is indicated for the treatment of:
• Hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative
advanced breast cancer in postmenopausal women not previously treated with endocrine
therapy, or
• HR-positive advanced breast cancer in pos...
